mnemonics: PLEASE DON'T FAIL: Pick Linked lists, Explain Data structures, Focus on Fundamentals, Apply Algorithms, Identify Logics, Link operations.
keyPoints: Understand and be able to implement core data structures (Arrays, Linked Lists, Stacks, Queues, Trees, Graphs)
Know the time/space complexity (Big O notation) for common operations on each structure
Be prepared to apply data structures to solve algorithm problems (e.g., using a stack for parsing, a queue for BFS, a heap for priority)
commonMistakes: Confusing the properties and use cases of similar structures (e.g., Stack vs. Queue, BST vs. Heap)
Incorrectly analyzing or stating time complexity, especially for nested operations
Writing syntactically incorrect pseudocode or forgetting edge cases in implementation
